basic_details.job_title: DBEO Kushinagar Teaching and Non Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 29 Peon, PGT and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: District Basic Education Office Kushinagar has released the official Various Posts Notification 2026 at the official website. A total of 29 vacancies have been announced under the DBEO Kushinagar Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 25 and 45 years with qualifications ranging from 8th Pass to Post Graduate along with B.Ed, D.El.Ed, TET, and other prescribed qualifications can apply offline on or before 20 June 2026. The official notification PDF and application form are available below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 25 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation for current staff in KGVB is equivalent to service period, but not exceeding 60 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Various qualifications from 8th pass to Post Graduate with B.Ed/D.El.Ed/TET etc.
qualification.details: Full Time Teacher (Mathematics): TET and Trained Graduate Full Time Teacher (Social Subjects): TET and Trained Graduate PGT (Chemistry): M.Sc. in Chemistry or equivalent PGT (Physics): M.Sc. in Physics or equivalent Part-time Teacher (Computer): Trained Graduate with Computer knowledge Part-time Teacher (Arts, Crafts & Music/Home Crafts): Graduate in Arts/Crafts/Music Lab Assistant: High School with Lab Technician Diploma Office Superintendent/Clerk: Graduate with Computer knowledge Assistant Cook (Class 6-8): 8th Pass Peon (Class 6-8): 8th Pass Assistant Cook (Class 9-12): 8th Pass Chowkidar (Class 9-12): 8th Pass

vacancy_details.Post Name: Part-time Teacher (Art, Craft & Music / Home Craft)

selection_process: Merit-based selection for most posts Interview for Cook/Assistant Cook
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DBEO Kushinagar Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: http://kushinagar.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DBEO Kushinagar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the DBEO Kushinagar Various Posts Recruitment 2026 is 20-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the DBEO Kushinagar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 29 vacancies available for various teaching and non-teaching posts in the DBEO Kushinagar Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the DBEO Kushinagar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for some posts is 8th pass, while others require higher qualifications up to Post Graduate with B.Ed/D.El.Ed/TET.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to the DBEO Kushinagar posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for applying to these posts is between 25 years to 45 years, with relaxation for current staff.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for the DBEO Kushinagar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their applications via registered post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary range for the posts in DBEO Kushinagar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The salary varies by post, ranging from Rs. 7147 to Rs. 25410 per month.

faq.question: Q7. Which organization is conducting the DBEO Kushinagar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by the District Basic Education Office Kushinagar (DBEO Kushinagar).

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number is एस०एस०ए०/के०जी०बी०बी०/नियुक्ति / 5672-00/2026-27.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the DBEO Kushinagar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes merit-based selection for most posts and an interview for specific roles like Cook, Peon, and Chowkidar.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website: http://kushinagar.nic.in.
